overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence showing a first-person perspective drifting down a snowy mountain river through a winter valley. The journey encounters a moose wading in the water and culminates in a dramatic descent over a waterfall edge.

agents.ego_description: drifting with the river current through the wide snowy valley, observing the mountain scenery

entered.detail: large snow-capped mountain peak dominating the background
snow-covered forested bank on the left side of the river
large snow-dusted rock formation on the right bank
dense pine trees lining the left riverbank
dense pine trees lining the right riverbank

segments.scene_description: Drifting down a wide snowy river valley with towering pine trees on both banks and a majestic snow-covered mountain in the distance. The dark reflective water carries the camera smoothly downstream through the serene winter landscape.

events.description: large elk emerges from the right bank and wades into the shallow river water

agents.ego_description: continuing to drift downstream, approaching and passing the elk standing in the water

notable_agents.action: elk wading in the shallow river near the right bank, facing downstream

segments.scene_description: Continuing downriver, a large elk emerges from the right bank and stands in the shallow water, creating a wildlife focal point as the camera drifts past. The rocky outcrops on the right bank draw closer while the mountain remains visible ahead.

events.description: elk exits the frame to the right as the river continues downstream
river banks become steeper and closer together as the valley narrows

agents.ego_description: drifting through the narrowing river channel with increasing current speed

segments.scene_description: The river valley narrows as the camera moves past the elk, with the banks becoming steeper and rockier. The snow-covered mountain remains visible in the background while the water flows faster toward the narrowing gap and waterfall ahead.

events.description: camera goes over the waterfall edge and begins rapid descent into the canyon

agents.ego_description: going over the waterfall edge and plunging down the cliff face into the canyon below

entered.detail: the precipice where the river drops off into the canyon
deep snowy canyon visible below the waterfall drop

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the waterfall edge, revealing the dramatic drop ahead. It goes over the falls, transitioning from the calm river to a rapid descent into the snowy canyon below, with steep cliff walls rushing past.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drift down a serene snowy river that culminates in a dramatic plunge over a waterfall. It begins by gliding smoothly through a wide valley flanked by towering pine trees, with a majestic snow-covered mountain anchoring the distant horizon. As the camera continues downstream, a large elk emerges from the right bank to stand in the shallow water, drawing the viewer closer to the rocky outcrops of the shoreline. The scene then shifts as the river valley narrows and the banks become steeper and rockier, causing the water to flow with increasing speed toward a tightening gap. Finally, the camera reaches the precipice and surges over the waterfall's edge, transitioning from the calm current into a rapid descent through the steep cliff walls of a snowy canyon.
